entries.note: V56-C consumes the shipped V56-A and V56-B packet, contract, checkpoint, runtime-state, ticket, diagnostics, and conformance surfaces by default.
V56-C preserves the exact V56-B selected live subset of local_reversible_execute and local_write only.
V56-C preserves the shipped operative interpretation of local scope, reversible scope, and bounded local write exclusions without semantic repartition.
V56-C adds one observation-only runtime harvest record over the shipped V56-B evidence chain.
V56-C adds advisory-only governance calibration and migration decision registers that do not mutate live behavior by default.
V56-C derives harvest, calibration, and migration outputs from committed fixtures, tickets, conformance, lane drift, and closeout evidence before any narrative interpretation.
